title: ‘Disclosure Day’ or Not, UFO Movies Never Left
description: Seems likely that 'Disclosure Day' is going to hit big, so Hollywood's looking to let UFO stories into its heart (and wallet).

title: 'Humming' UFO seen hovering over major UK city before disappearing with 'a pop'
description: A witness described the translucent disk-shaped object as having a "light" at the front before it vanished with a "pop" over Liverpool's iconic Royal Albert Dock on Sunday

title: Hollywood's UFO and alien obsession is back in 2026, but this time it's really serious
description: Hollywood's UFO obsession returns: Spielberg and Kosinski lead serious alien shift Leer
